name: South Dakota DLR Plumbing Commission Licensing

agency.name: South Dakota Department of Labor and Regulation Plumbing Commission

updateFrequency: unknown; verify against the official Plumbing Commission pages before relying on freshness assumptions
licenseTypesIncluded: South Dakota plumbing, sewer and water, appliance, manufactured/mobile home, irrigation, water conditioning, and related plumbing commission license categories described by official pages
knownExclusions: This source entry is scoped to the South Dakota Plumbing Commission and does not represent every contractor, electrical, local permit, or tax registration source in South Dakota.
The official pages describe licensing categories but no stable public lookup or bulk dataset has been modeled yet.
Electrical licensing and local contractor licensing should be separate source entries if researched.
rateLimitNotes: No adapter is implemented. Further research is needed before any automated access path is considered.
publicRecordsNotes: Official licensing-page metadata only. Absence from this source is not proof that a plumbing, electrical, local contractor, or other authorization does not exist elsewhere.
officialBulkDownloadNotes: No official bulk download or stable lookup endpoint has been confirmed in this phase.
researchNotes: Registry-only source for South Dakota Plumbing Commission licensing pages. Future work should research whether public lookup data exists for plumbing and electrical commission records.
maintainerNotes: This is a researched official licensing source, not an implemented verification path.
